sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a persistent cough for three days, productive of thick, green sputum. He states he feels fatigued and has a mild fever.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Temperature is 100.4°F. Lung auscultation reveals rhonchi in the right lower lobe. No other abnormalities detected.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with acute bronchitis.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 7 days. Advise patient to rest and drink plenty of fluids. Follow up if symptoms do not improve within 72 hours.
